title: zelkova abelicea
intro: Zelkova abelicea, also known as Abel's maple or Korean elm, is a deciduous tree native to Korea and China. The tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Zelkova abelicea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Zelkova abelicea include tea, tincture, and decoction, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including respiratory issues, skin problems, and digestive issues.
